case_title: STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY VS. WALTER LANGHAMMER et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WALTER LANGHAMMER AKA WALTER LANGHAMMER AKA WALTER LANGHAMMER SR. DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL.
